description: AudioTransformAssetComponent — ffmpeg-based audio resample / convert / trim.

audio_path_column.label: Audio Path Column
audio_path_column.description: Column containing local audio file paths.

output_dir.label: Output Dir
output_dir.description: Filesystem dir to write transformed audio into.

output_filename_template.label: Output Filename Template
output_filename_template.description: Filename template (no dir). Supports `{<column>}` and `{row_index}`. Default: <input_basename>_t.<target_format>.

target_format.label: Target Format
target_format.description: Output codec / container. Extension is set from this.

sample_rate.label: Sample Rate
sample_rate.description: Resample to this Hz. E.g. 16000 for Whisper, 44100 CD-quality. Omit to leave unchanged.

channels.label: Channels
channels.description: Force channel count. 1 = mono, 2 = stereo. Omit to leave unchanged.

normalize.label: Normalize
normalize.description: Apply `loudnorm` filter for EBU R128 loudness normalization.

name: Audio Transform Asset
